description: Target VChart spec has required fields and valid basic structure.
All source fields are mapped or listed in unsupportedMappings.
Chart renders on initial mount with no blank state for valid data.
Legend item count and toggle behavior are acceptable versus source chart.
Tooltip trigger and key content are acceptable versus source chart.
Resize behavior is stable and does not break axes or labels.
Empty data does not crash and shows expected empty state.
If blockers exist, ECharts fallback path is available.
